title: centaurea subtilis
intro: Centaurea subtilis, also known as the lesser knapweed, is a perennial plant belonging to the daisy family Asteraceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing inflammation and improving digestion, as well as exhibiting antioxidant and antiseptic properties. Centaurea subtilis can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for its medicinal use.
